candidates.why: This is an explicit COGS-related D&A component, but it appears to roll up into the already selected parent row 'Cost of sales' together with 'Amortization in COR/COGS' and 'Cost of sales - Other', so adding it separately would double count.
This is an explicit COGS-related D&A component, but it appears to be included within the already selected parent row 'Cost of sales'; adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of sales'. The statement structure shows 'Cost of sales' as a parent total and the COGS D&A rows as components beneath it, so no separate COGS D&A should be added.

candidates.why: This appears to be a separate SG&A-related D&A row sitting outside the selected component row 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Other'. The sales and distribution total appears to be built from 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Other' plus this row plus 'Sales and distribution costs/ Amortization and impairment', so it should be added separately relative to the selected XSGA component bucket.

candidates.row_label: Sales and distribution costs/ Amortization and impairment
candidates.why: This is a separate SG&A amortization row that appears to sit outside the selected 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Other' row and roll into the broader sales/distribution total, so it should be added separately.

This is a separate administrative D&A row outside the selected 'Administrative costs - Other' row. The administrative total appears to be composed of 'Administrative costs - Other' plus this depreciation/impairment row plus the administrative amortization row, so it should be added separately.
This is a separate administrative amortization row outside the selected 'Administrative costs - Other' row and appears to roll into the administrative total, so it should be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Research and development costs, depreciation and impairment
candidates.why: Although this is explicit R&D-related D&A, the same above-EBIT R&D row 'Research and development costs' was already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD. Per the R&D interaction rule, adding R&D D&A separately would risk distortion/double handling, so it should not be added.

candidates.row_label: Research and development costs, amortization and impairment
candidates.why: Although this is explicit R&D-related D&A, the same above-EBIT R&D row 'Research and development costs' was already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD. Per the R&D interaction rule, this should not be added separately.

final_choice.row_label: Sales and distribution costs/ Amortization and impairment

variables.notes: Selected XSGA component bucket uses 'other' rows rather than parent totals, so the visible SG&A/admin D&A lines sit outside those selected rows and should be added separately. R&D D&A rows are excluded because 'Research and development costs' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
